title: Dreamy Smoky Venezuelan Cashew Lasagna
description: A smoky and cheesy Venezuelan dish featuring cashew nuts, perfect for a lazy Sunday, this ovo-vegetarian friendly lasagna is a twist on traditional recipes with the added depth of tadka spices.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the lasagna noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
In a blender or food processor, combine the chopped cashew nuts, ricotta cheese, eggs, tadka spice mix, smoked paprika if using, and a pinch of salt, then blend until smooth.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and add the blended cashew nut mixture, cooking for about 5 minutes or until it starts to thicken.
In a large baking dish, create a thin layer of the cashew nut mixture, then arrange 4 lasagna noodles on top.
Spread half of the remaining cashew nut mixture over the noodles, followed by half of the shredded mozzarella cheese.
Repeat the layers, starting with the noodles, then the remaining cashew nut mixture, and finally the remaining mozzarella cheese.
Cover the baking dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let it rest for a few minutes before slicing and serving garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
